title: The Goldsmith Shops of Ponte Vecchio in Florence - Journeys to Italy

# The Goldsmith Shops of Ponte Vecchio in Florence: History and Curiosities
* **August 30, 2024  ...    *If there is an iconic place in Florence that fully represents the soul and spirit of the Tuscan capital, the Ponte Vecchio is definitely the symbolic spot, one of the most romantic and evocative locations in the world. Known for its picturesque goldsmith shops overlooking the Arno River, the bridge represents a perfect blend of art, history, and craftsmanship. In this article, we will explore the history of these goldsmith shops, some lesser-known curiosities  ...    Ponte Vecchio is the oldest bridge in Florence, dating back to Roman times, but**its current stone structure was completed in 1345**. Originally, the bridge housed butchers and greengrocers, whose shops were considered less  ...    So when was the decision made that Ponte Vecchio should host only goldsmiths and jewelers?
